mapper.insert:
insert into agent_memory(id, agent_id, memory_name, params_definition, version_no, version_status, source_task_id, summary, create_reason, client_id, user_id, create_user_id, create_time, update_time, status, reserve, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.agentId}, #{entity.memoryName}, #{entity.paramsDefinition}, #{entity.versionNo}, #{entity.versionStatus}, #{entity.sourceTaskId}, #{entity.summary}, #{entity.createReason}, #{entity.clientId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.createUserId}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserve}, #{entity.remark})
